arts.ttl: Chelsea next five fixtures compared to Liverpool, Man City and Arsenal in title race
arts.sum: December 15 vs Manchester United (H) at 4.30pm - Premier League Chelsea have secured their third consecutive Premier League win after beating rock-bottom Southampton 5-1 on the south coast on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Why Jack Stephens was sent-off after bizarre Marc Cucurella flashpoint vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Mark Clattenburg has suggested that Southampton's Jack Stephens should have no complaints over his red card after his act of violent conduct during the Premier League game with Chelsea . The referee was called to the monitor and deemed it worthy of a red card for violent conduct.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive new referee red card verdict after Marc Cucurella incident vs Southampton
arts.sum: Ex-Premier League referee Mike Dean believes that Tony Harrington made the right call to send off Jack Stephens for pulling Marc Cucurella's hair during Southampton's clash with Chelsea . "Unfortunately, I was involved in one of these incidents about three years ago where I think someone had pulled Cucurella's hair, I didn't do it [send him off] but you've seen he clearly does it, he's going to be sent-off," Dean said.

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings in Southampton win as Madueke shines and Felix excellent
arts.sum: The second-half was more of a low-key affair but it did lead to Cole Palmer scoring and Jadon Sancho not too long after that. Madueke turned from assister to goal scorer next with a fabulous finish into the bottom corner after a pass from Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: ‘Improved so much’: Stephen Warnock really impressed by ‘excellent’ Chelsea player in 5-1 win over Southampton
arts.sum: Chelsea made it four wins in a row after the international break in all competitions in dominant style against Southampton at St. Mary’s. A 5-1...

arts.ttl: Saints boss Martin 'very proud' despite heavy defeat
arts.sum: Southampton boss Russell Martin is "very proud" and "feels good" about his players despite a heavy 5-1 home defeat by Chelsea.

arts.ttl: 'He has to work more': Enzo Maresca calls out Noni Madueke despite scoring return for Chelsea
arts.sum: The forward scored one and assisted another against Southampton but his manager remains displeased

arts.ttl: Southampton 1-5 Chelsea: Match report and talking points from Blues rout at St. Mary's
arts.sum: Match report and talking points from Southampton 1-5 Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca was furious with his Chelsea players straight after they scored against Southampton – journalist
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will no doubt have been feeling a bit of pressure for his Chelsea side to win tonight after ringing the changes to his...

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans think they know why Noni Madueke played so well in 5-1 win over Southampton
arts.sum: Chelsea had five different goalscorers during tonight’s 5-1 away win at Southampton, including Noni Madueke. Chelsea have moved up to second in the Premier League...
